files.purpose: FileManager: open/create .meta/catalog.dat, free-list bitmap page allocation.

symbols.name: FileManager.persistBitmap
symbols.note: unexported; WriteAt + Sync of page 0 for durability

files.purpose: TestCatalogFileManager covering the 5 test-spec scenarios via t.Run subtests.

acceptance_criteria: Opening a non-existent catalog.dat creates an initial free-list page.
Allocating a new page marks it used in the free-list.
Deleting/merging a slot returns the page to free-list reclamation (FreePage exercised directly, per subtask scope).
design_decisions: Free-list encoded as a bitmap on reserved page 0 (bit i tracks page i+1), not a linked list of free page IDs -- see architecture-discovery.md for capacity math and rationale.
AllocatePage scans for lowest-numbered free bit before extending the file, satisfying reuse-before-extend.
persistBitmap() does a real WriteAt(offset 0) + Sync on every AllocatePage/FreePage call -- durable but not WAL-backed (WAL is engine/wal/, a later phase).
FileManager has no internal locking (single-threaded phase-1 scope); -race in the test command guards test-setup races only, not concurrent-FileManager-use guarantees.
out_of_scope_confirmed_not_implemented: Catalog CRUD API + striped-mutex locking (1.1.5, catalog.go)

index_updates.file.jsonl: 2 new entries appended for engine/catalog/file.go and engine/catalog/file_test.go
